comment: EmulatR DS20 / PC264 platform device manifest (Tsunami 21272, dual EV6; boot uniprocessor with cpuCount=1). Created 2026-06-16. DS20 = PC264 lineage, the SAME platform family as the DS10/PC264 EmulatR already models -- it genuinely uses the Cypress CY82C693 south bridge, so this is the LOWEST-divergence second test after DS10 (firmware ds20_v7_3.exe or ds20_disk1/pc264srm.sys). Differences from DS10: dual-CPU capable (keep cpuCount=1 to avoid SRM secondary spin), DS20E uses DE500 at slot 9 / SCSI at slot 7 per REFERENCE_INDEX (slots here _PROVISIONAL/DS10-derived). The halt-button check is chipset-level (TIG smir). Strict JSON: no // or /* */ comments -- use comment fields.

iic_devices.name: iic_ocp0
iic_devices.comment: OCP LED panel (IIC_LED_TYPE @ 0x40, iic_driver.c). Presence is the get_sysvar (pc264.c) platform discriminator: fopen(iic_ocp0) success -> SYSVAR member 6 -> banner 'AlphaServer DS20' (vs default member 1 = 'AlphaPC 264DP'). Do NOT add iic_8574_ocp (0x4E) -> member 8 = DS20E/Goldrack.

iic_devices.name: iic_ocp1
iic_devices.comment: OCP data device (IIC_LED_TYPE @ 0x42). The OCP is a control+data PAIR: ocp0 (0x40)=control, ocp1 (0x42)=data (sable_ocp_driver.c). sable_ocp_init opens BOTH; presenting only ocp0 caused 'Device Open Error: IIC_OCP1' + sable_ocp_init exit status 1 (non-fatal).

pci_devices.name: cypress_ide
pci_devices.comment: Cypress 82C693 IDE func1 (genuine for PC264/DS20). Fixed legacy ports; no relocatable BARs.

storage.comment: primary master = dqa0. media = bare image FILENAME resolved against [Storage] diskDir; empty = no disk.
primary slave = dqa1, ATAPI CD. media empty = no disc loaded.

pci_devices.name: de500_tulip
pci_devices.comment: On-board DE500-AA (DECchip 21143 tulip). DS20E places it at slot 9; slot here _PROVISIONAL.
